message.content:
Test file: /home/experimenter/experiments/runs/2026-05-10_03-35-32_claim-office-example-mapping_v4-exact-subagents_opus-4-7-no-thinking/src/claim-office.spec.ts
Failing test: "quote with unknown item type (e.g. broomstick) → non-zero exit, error to stderr, no results to stdout"
Expected behavior: When the CLI encounters a quote step with an item whose type is not one of the known item types (sword/amulet/staff/potion/rune/moonstone), the CLI must exit with non-zero status, write an error message to stderr, and write nothing to stdout.
Current error: status is 0, NaN premium produced.
Implementation file: /home/experimenter/experiments/runs/2026-05-10_03-35-32_claim-office-example-mapping_v4-exact-subagents_opus-4-7-no-thinking/src/cli.ts

Approach: Wrap CLI logic in try/catch. Validate item types before calling quote, throw on unknown. In catch, write error message to stderr and process.exit(1). Make sure no JSON is written to stdout when error occurs.

Run pnpm test, confirm 45 passing.

EXPERIMENT MODE: Run autonomously, proceed to Refactor after completion.

content.text: I'll implement the minimal code to make the failing test pass.

content.text:
All 45 tests pass.

Green Phase Complete:
**Implementation**: Wrapped CLI logic in try/catch. Added validation that checks each item's type against the known item types list (sword/amulet/staff/potion/rune/moonstone) before calling quote. On unknown type, throws an error. The catch block writes error message to stderr and exits with status 1, ensuring no JSON is written to stdout when an error occurs.
**Result**: All tests now pass (45 passing, 4 todo)
**Approach**: Minimal — added a known types array, a simple validation loop in the quote branch, and a try/catch wrapper around the main scenario processing.

Proceeding to Refactor phase.

Relevant file: /home/experimenter/experiments/runs/2026-05-10_03-35-32_claim-office-example-mapping_v4-exact-subagents_opus-4-7-no-thinking/src/cli.ts
